title: senecio cenomanensis
intro: Senecio cenomanensis, also known as Cenomanian ragwort, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include potential uses in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Senecio cenomanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
